Uses of Class
model.SalableProduct

  • Packages that use SalableProduct 
    Package Description
    model  
    service  

    • Uses of SalableProduct in model

      Subclasses of SalableProduct in model 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  Armor
      Represents an Armor item in the store.
      class  Health
      Represents a Health item in the store (like potions).
      class  Weapon
      Represents a Weapon item in the store.

    • Uses of SalableProduct in service

      Methods in service that return types with arguments of type SalableProduct 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.Optional<SalableProduct> InventoryManager.findByName​(java.lang.String name)
      Finds a product by name (case-insensitive).
      java.util.List<SalableProduct> InventoryManager.listProducts()
      Returns all products in inventory as a list.
      Methods in service with parameters of type SalableProduct 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void InventoryManager.addProduct​(SalableProduct product)
      Adds a product to inventory.
